summary: Full Cost / Overhead / Net Margin / Financial Alerts - All 41 tests passed. Complete backend testing for 7 phases: Employee Full Cost Model, Overhead Snapshots, Overhead Allocation, Package Net Margin, Project Net Profit, Financial Alerts, and Project Risk Summary.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing: tech1 employee (6f69367a), PRJ-001 project, TEST_Activity_1 package.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full cost/overhead/margin module fully tested. Employee tech1 (6f69367a-e25f-489d-a7c8-f25cde6a9ac5) has net_salary=2850, net_hour_cost=16.19. Config: additional_cost_percent=25, overhead_percent=15 → full=22.67. PRJ-001 (c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da) has 100% labor share. Overhead for 2026-03: snapshots (rent=2500, utilities=800) + legacy overhead = ~8714 total. Execution package TEST_Activity_1 receives allocated overhead.

P1: GET /api/employee-cost/{id} returns.notes: Returns complete cost breakdown. tech1: net_salary=2850, net_hour_cost=16.19, additional=4.05, overhead=2.43, full=22.67

P1: PUT /api/employee-cost-config saves.notes: Config saved to settings collection (_id=employee_cost_config). Updates reflect in employee-cost endpoint.

P1: Net salary field is NOT modified by.notes: Config changes only affect additional/overhead percentages. Net salary remains from employee profile.

P2: POST /api/overhead-snapshots creates.notes: Creates snapshot with category_code, category_name, period_key, amount, allocation_basis. Returns 201.

P2: GET /api/overhead-snapshots/aggregat.notes: Aggregates new snapshots + legacy overhead_transactions. 2026-03: rent=2500, utilities=800 + legacy=5414 = ~8714 total.

P3: POST /api/overhead-allocation/comput.notes: PRJ-001 has 100% labor share → receives 8714.28 EUR overhead allocation for 2026-03.

P3: Allocation also distributes to execu.notes: TEST_Activity_1 package receives overhead_actual_allocated=8714.28 (100% of project allocation as only package with used_hours).

P5: GET /api/project-net-profit/{id} ret.notes: Returns revenue breakdown (contracted/earned/billed/collected/receivables), costs, profit with expected vs actual.

P5: Revenue basis = earned when availabl.notes: PRJ-001 earned=2500 > 0, so basis='earned'. Revenue used for profit calculations.

P6: GET /api/financial-alerts/{id} retur.notes: Returns alerts array with type, severity, message. PRJ-001 has 4 alerts: subcontract_payable, client_receivable, unmapped_material, unmapped_labor.

P6: Alerts have severity levels (info/wa.notes: All alerts have valid severity: info, warning, or critical based on condition severity.

P7: GET /api/project-risk/{id} returns r.notes: Returns risk_level, risk_flags array, explanations array, flag_count. PRJ-001: level=low, 2 flags.

P7: Risk level based on flag severity co.notes: PRJ-001 has 2 flags → level='low'. Rules: ok(0), low(1-2), medium(3+), high(2+ critical).

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
